title.rendered: Wheel Fun Rentals Partners with Indianapolis Indians for “Win a Swan Pedal Boat Ride with Rowdie” Sweepstakes

content.rendered:
For Immediate Release:
June 3, 2025

Indianapolis, IN – Wheel Fun Rentals is thrilled to announce an exciting new partnership with the Indianapolis Indians to launch the “Win a Swan Pedal Boat Ride with Rowdie” Sweepstakes. This unique opportunity invites fans to enter for a chance to enjoy a whimsical swan pedal boat ride on the scenic Indianapolis Canal alongside the beloved Indians mascot, Rowdie. It’s a one-of-a-kind summer experience designed to bring families and baseball lovers together for unforgettable fun.

The grand prize includes much more than just a ride on the water. One lucky winner will receive four (4) tickets to an upcoming Indianapolis Indians game at Victory Field, plus a gift card valid at the Indians Team Store and concession stands. It’s the perfect way to spend a summer day—starting with laughter and leisure on the canal, followed by the excitement of a game under the lights in one of Minor League Baseball’s most iconic ballparks.

“We’re excited to partner with the Indianapolis Indians to offer fans a chance to make some amazing summer memories,” said Marc Dixon, Area Manager at Wheel Fun Rentals. “There’s nothing like a swan boat ride on the Indy Canal—especially when Rowdie is along for the ride! This sweepstakes is a fun way to connect the community, celebrate the season, and highlight two of Indy’s favorite attractions.”

Don’t miss your chance to ride with Rowdie! The sweepstakes is open now through June 9, 2025. To enter, visit wheelfunrentals.com/ride-with-rowdie. Whether you’re a longtime fan or new to the fun, this sweepstakes promises smiles, selfies, and memories to last a lifetime.

Wheel Fun Rentals has been in the recreation business for over 30 years and is the nation’s leader in outdoor recreation activities. Wheel Fun Rentals also operates four locations in the Indianapolis area, including Canal Walk, Eagle Creek Outfitters, White River State Park, and Geist Waterfront Pak offering a full variety of specialty cycles, two-wheel bikes and watercraft rentals including sporty recumbent cycles, swan pedal boats, stand-up paddle boards, kayaks, and much more. Available rentals vary by location. For more information about Wheel Fun Rentals in Indianapolis and to find location information, visit wheelfunrentals.com/Indianapolis.

###

Media Contact: Alicia Thomas | (317) 634-1171 | athomas@seasegerig.com

 

About Wheel Fun Rentals
Founded in 1987, Wheel Fun Rentals started with four wheel Surrey cycles, evolved into specialty bike rentals and bike tours, and now offers recreational rentals of all kinds from more than 100 outlets in 16 states. Specializing in unique bikes and tours, Wheel Fun Rentals has been offering clean, healthy family fun and affordable outdoor entertainment to nearly 3 million customers annually from city and state parks, resorts, and retail outlets through corporate locations and franchised territories. For more information about Wheel Fun Rentals please visit www.wheelfunrentals.com or call 805-650-7770. Follow Wheel Fun Rentals: @WheelFunRentalsOfficial on Facebook, @WheelFunRentalsOfficial on Instagram, and @WheelFunRentals on Twitter.
